problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
